subcodes.first_line: O thou who art mentioned before the Wronged One! Thy letter which thou didst dispatch unto Asad, upon him be My glory, hath attained unto My hearing. We have hearkened unto thy call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المذکور لدی المظلوم قد فاز کتابک الذی ارسلته الی اسد علیه بهائی باصغائی سمعنا ندائک
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @firmness in the Covenant, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
